entries.summary: Created comprehensive test suite for Navbar component with 3 tests covering authentication gating, nav rendering, and active route highlighting

functions.name: returns null when not authenticated
functions.purpose: Verifies Navbar component returns null when user is not authenticated

functions.name: renders desktop nav when authenticated
functions.purpose: Verifies Navbar component renders navigation items when user is authenticated

functions.name: highlights active route
functions.purpose: Verifies Navbar component applies bg-accent class to active route based on pathname

entries.summary: Integrated Navbar component into app layout header between AppTitle and AuthHeader

integrations.description: Navbar component integrated into root layout header, positioned between AppTitle and AuthHeader in flex container
integrations.dataFlow: Layout renders → AuthProvider provides auth context → Navbar consumes useAuth() → Shows/hides based on authentication state → User clicks nav link → Next.js client-side navigation

entries.summary: Created Navbar component with desktop horizontal navigation and mobile Sheet menu, featuring active route highlighting and authentication-based visibility

components.name: Navbar
components.purpose: Main navigation component for authenticated users with responsive desktop/mobile views and active route highlighting
components.props: None (uses React hooks: useAuth, usePathname, useState)
exports: Navbar (named export via barrel export from index.ts)

entries.summary: Installed shadcn Sheet component for mobile navigation menu

components.name: Sheet
components.purpose: Slide-out panel component built on Radix UI Dialog primitive for mobile navigation menus
